hero.headline: Themadhood's PI Automations
body: Themadhood's PI Automations is the Raspberry Pi automation and orchestration branch operating under Themadhood's PI Solutions. It exists to build repeatable automation behavior that coordinates devices, schedules actions, and supports real-world operational routines across Pi deployments.

This branch focuses on automation frameworks, event-driven workflows, and structured control systems that make Pi-based operations consistent and dependable. The goal is to keep automation modular and maintainable while supporting growth into larger multi-device environments.

By maintaining a dedicated Pi automation branch, Themadhood can build smart systems without losing clarity. PI Automations supports reliable behavior, safer operations, and long-term expansion across hardware-integrated projects.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: Themadhood's PI Automations was created to support dependable automation across Themadhood's Raspberry Pi environments. As part of Themadhood's PI Solutions, it exists to build automation systems that can run continuously, adapt to change, and remain maintainable as deployments grow.

The branch supports device orchestration, scheduled workflows, event-triggered automation, and consistent control patterns designed for practical long-term operation. Emphasis is placed on clear behavior, predictable outcomes, and systems that remain understandable instead of becoming overcomplicated.
PI Automations is built for continuity. It allows Pi-based systems to operate reliably over time while remaining structured, expandable, and connected to the broader technical ecosystem.

items.title: Pi Automation Workflow Design
items.body: Design of automation workflows that coordinate device behavior with clear logic and predictable outcomes. Systems are built to remain modular and easy to expand over time.

items.title: Event Triggers & Orchestration
items.body: Implementation of event-based control patterns including triggers, actions, and escalation logic. Emphasis is placed on structured decision-making and consistent execution.

items.title: Scheduled Operations & Routines
items.body: Development of scheduled automation routines that run safely over long periods. These systems support recurring tasks, maintenance patterns, and predictable system behavior.

items.title: Reliability & Recovery Automation
items.body: Creation of automation behaviors that handle reconnects, failures, and recovery routines cleanly. The goal is stable long-term operation without constant human oversight.
